ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded trading data */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset on that date */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number for tracking purposes */,
  "actions_taken" INTEGER /* Actions taken on that date (e.g., buy/sell signal) */,
  "transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions executed */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets value at the end of the trading day */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward or penalty associated with actions taken */,
  "assets_baseline" REAL /* Baseline value of assets for performance comparison */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the asset */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the asset on that date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., exchange, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the trader joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trader (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the trader's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the trader's last activity */,
  "reset_password_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset */,
  "reset_password_expires" TEXT /* Expiration date and time for the password reset token */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trader */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the trader */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the trader */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the trader */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of asset involved in the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Transaction fee associated with the trade */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the trade (profit or loss) */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used for the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset involved in the trade */,
  "time_in_force" TEXT /* Time in force for the trade (e.g., GTC, IOC) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "filled_amount" REAL /* Amount of the asset that has been filled */,
  "filled_price" REAL /* Average price at which the trade was filled */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop loss price for the trade */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take profit price for the trade */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader for whom metrics are recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return on investment for the trader */,
  "annualized_return" REAL /* Annualized return calculated from total return */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk factor associated with the trader's portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio indicating risk-adjusted return */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy for which metrics are recorded */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the trader's portfolio */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown experienced by the trader */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio indicating risk-adjusted return for downside risk */,
  "calmar_ratio" REAL /* Calmar ratio indicating risk-adjusted return for maximum drawdown */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the trader's portfolio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the trader's portfolio */,
  "information_ratio" REAL /* Information ratio indicating risk-adjusted return for active management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who received the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, market trend) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the alert */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., momentum, mean reversion) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the strategy (e.g., moving average period) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the market event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., economic report, earnings release) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "impact" REAL /* Estimated impact on market values */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset affected by the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., news article, regulatory filing) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_events_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction cost entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade associated with the cost */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., commission, fee) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost incurred */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the transaction cost */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction cost */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction cost (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_costs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_costs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset (e.g., biotechnology, pharmaceuticals) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the asset is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the asset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was added to the system */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)
